description: Initial screen state: Dark background with screen sharing instructions and a participant video feed.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text instructions for screen sharing and a small inset video of the user.

description: Task instructions are typed out on the screen.
frame_description: Text is appearing on the dark background, detailing the flight booking task.

description: An 'Open' button appears in the center of the screen.
frame_description: A circular button with the word 'Open' is now visible in the middle of the screen.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button at the moment of the click.

description: The browser navigates to the Flight Centre homepage.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Travel Packages | Flight Centre

description: User hovers over the VA223 flight details.

description: User clicks on the price button for the 12:10pm flight.

description: 'Select Returning Fare Type' section expands below the selected flight.
frame_description: A new section appears showing different fare types (Lite, Choice, Flex) for the selected flight.

description: User hovers over the 'SELECT' button for the Lite fare.

description: The SELECT button changes to a green checkmark.
frame_description: The button now shows a green checkmark, indicating the fare has been selected.

description: 'All Set!' loading overlay appears on screen.
frame_description: A white overlay with a loading spinner and the text 'All Set!' is visible.

description: The UI transitions to the 'Review trip' page.
frame_description: The page now displays a summary of the selected departing and returning flights under the heading 'Review trip'.

description: User scrolls down the 'Review trip' page.

description: User scrolls further down to the bottom of the review page.
frame_description: The user scrolls past the baggage and seat selection sections.

description: User hovers over the 'CONTINUE' button.

description: User clicks the 'CONTINUE' button.

description: 'Thanks for confirming your flights' loading overlay appears.

description: Passenger details form renders on the page.
frame_description: The 'Travellers' page is now visible with form fields for passenger names and birth dates.

description: Testing tool overlay 'What's making you hesitate there' appears.
